name: Metronidazole
description: Ọgwụ nje Nitroimidazole nwere ezigbo mkpuchi anaerobic na protozoal. Ihe dị mkpa maka ịbanye n'ime ọnya afọ / eriri afọ iji kpuchie osisi gut anaerobic. A na-ejikarị ya na ciprofloxacin.
indications: Ịba n'ime afọ / eriri afọ trauma
Ọrịa anụ ahụ dị nro anaerobic
dose: 500 mg IV q6-8h. PO: 500 mg q8h (ọ bụrụ na anabatara ọnụ).
contraindications: Nke mbụ trimester nke afọ ime (ihe ikwu)
A maara metronidazole ma ọ bụ nitroimidazole nfụkasị ahụ
warnings: Mmeghachi omume dị ka Disulfiram na mmanya --aṅụla mmanya na-aba n'anya n'oge ọgwụgwọ na 48h mgbe e mesịrị.
Enwere ike ibute neuropathy akụkụ site na iji ogologo oge.
Zere n'ime ọnwa atọ mbụ ma ọ bụrụ na ọ ga-ekwe omume.

pediatric.dose: 7.5 mg / kg IV / PO q6h (max 500 mg / dose).
pediatric.note: Nchekwa na ụmụaka toro eto. Zere na ụmụ ọhụrụ.

obstetric.note: Zere n'ime ọnwa atọ mbụ ma ọ bụrụ na ọ ga-ekwe omume. Jiri nkeji nke abụọ/nke atọ mgbe ọ dị mkpa maka ahụike --erite na-akakarị ihe ize ndụ maka ọrịa anaerobic siri ike.

source: JTS CPG: Wound Care / Abdominal Trauma
